title: Segfault while reading database with a corrupt index
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id UInt32, name String, age Nullable(UInt32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO users (name, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
CREATE INDEX idx_users_name ON users (name) TYPE minmax;
SELECT * FROM users WHERE age = (SELECT MAX(age) FROM users WHERE age IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: Reading database with a corrupt index
